title: campanula fragilis subsp. fragilis
intro: Campanula fragilis subsp. fragilis, also known as the fragile bellflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Campanula fragilis subsp. fragilis include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress and anxiety. Campanula fragilis subsp. fragilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
